SEARCH

Uses of Class
discount.Discount

Packages that use Discount
Package
Description
discount
It includes all the methods and classes necessary to apply and create discounts.
notification
This package contains everything related to the notifications of the store.
product
It includes everything product-unique.
store
It contains everything related to the management of the store.

  • Uses of Discount in discount

    Subclasses of Discount in discount
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CategoryDiscount
    It implements the general discount for those with Category coverage
    class 
    CategoryFixedPercentage
    It implements the Category discount whose type is Fixed Percentage
    class 
    CategoryGift
    It implements the Category discount whose type is Gift
    class 
    CategoryQuantity
    It implements the Category discount whose type is Quantity
    class 
    CategoryVolume
    It implements the Category discount whose type is Volume
    class 
    PackDiscount
    It implements the general discount for those with Pack coverage
    class 
    PackFixedPercentage
    It implements the Pack discount whose type is Fixed Percentage
    class 
    PackGift
    It implements the Pack discount whose type is Gift
    class 
    PackQuantity
    It implements the Pack discount whose type is Quantity
    class 
    PackVolume
    It implements the Pack discount whose type is Volume
    class 
    ProductDiscount
    It implements the general discount for those with Product coverage
    class 
    ProductFixedPercentage
    It implements the Product discount whose type is FixedPercentage
    class 
    ProductGift
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Gift
    class 
    ProductQuantity
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Quantity
    class 
    ProductVolume
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Volume

  • Uses of Discount in product

    Methods in product that return Discount
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Discount
    Pack.getDiscount()
    It gets the pack's discount
    Discount
    StoreProduct.getDiscount()
    Gets discount.
    Methods in product with parameters of type Discount
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Pack.setDiscount(Discount newDiscount)
    It allows an employee to add discounts to packs (Discounts is in charge of making sure they don't overlap)
    void
    StoreProduct.setDiscount(Discount newDiscount)
    It allows an employee to add discounts to products or categories (Discounts is in charge of making sure they don't overlap)

  • Uses of Discount in store

    Methods in store that return Discount
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Discount
    Pager.selectDiscountFromPage(int pageNum, int discountNum)
    It gets the discount listed as n.º discountNum in a certain page
    Methods in store that return types with arguments of type Discount
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Discount>
    Store.getDiscounts()
    Gets the list of the discounts of the store
    List<Discount>
    Pager.pageDiscountList(int pageNum)
    It gets a sub-list of discounts according to the desired page
